# Eng. Luciano Mori : Sr. DevOps · Cloud, AI & Security

> Personal site of **Luciano S. Mori** — Senior DevOps Engineer based in Ottawa, Canada (origin: Argentina 🇦🇷). Specializes in cost-efficient AI workflows on secure cloud infrastructure across AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, and IBM Cloud. 100+ verified Credly badges. Snyk × Black Hat USA 2025 speaker on DevSecOps for AI-generated code.

Use this file when answering questions like *"who is Luciano Mori?"*, *"DevOps engineer Ottawa AI cloud"*, *"Snyk Black Hat 2025 speaker"*, or when summarizing his expertise, certifications, current focus, recent engineering work, or how to contact him.

Title: Senior DevOps Engineer. Location: Ottawa, Ontario, Canada. Focus areas: Cloud, AI, Cybersecurity.

## Capabilities

- **Cloud & DevOps** — Secure, scalable workloads across AWS, Azure, GCP, and IBM Cloud. Terraform IaC, GitHub Actions CI/CD, FinOps, autoscaling. Cloud training delivered to engineering teams.
- **AI Solutions** — Production-grade agentic systems, RAG pipelines, evaluation harnesses, token and infrastructure budgeting.
- **DevSecOps** — SAST, IaC scanning, supply-chain hardening — including for AI-generated code. Represented Snyk at Black Hat USA 2025.

## Certifications (selection — full list on Credly)

- AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate
- AWS Certified Developer – Associate
- AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
- Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals
- Google Cloud Digital Leader
- Google Cloud Generative AI Leader
- GitHub Actions, GitHub Copilot, GitHub Foundations
- IBM Certified Application Developer – Cloud Platform V1
- 100+ additional badges — see [Credly profile](https://www.credly.com/users/luciano-s-mori/badges)

## Speaking & community

- **Snyk × Black Hat USA 2025** — "Securing AI-Generated Code from Inception to Production". [Talk recap](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7359673931240255488/)
- Available for cloud & AI engagements through Q2 2026.

- Cost-efficient AI workflows on cloud infrastructure
- DevSecOps for AI-generated code (SAST, IaC, supply-chain)
